# Forexyy - AI-Powered News Analysis & Breaking Stories

Forexyy is an advanced economic intelligence and real-time news platform providing high-performance news aggregation, structured expert insights, and interactive AI audio commentary.

## Site Navigation for AI Agents

- [Home Page](https://forexyy.com/) - Live economic updates, trending economic analyses, and breaking news.
- [Articles Feed](https://forexyy.com/articles) - Exhaustive feed of curated global and regional articles with real-time audio commentary.
- [Reels Feed](https://forexyy.com/reels) - Immersive vertical video feeds highlighting current micro-insights in economics.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://forexyy.com/) - Core site guidelines and user agreements.
